differential_diagnoses: Myelodysplastic syndrome with paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria clone
next_steps: Flow cytometry for PNH (CD55 and CD59 expression on neutrophils and erythrocytes)
Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with cytogenetics
Serum haptoglobin, free hemoglobin, and ferritin levels
Soluble IL-2 receptor level (sCD25) to assess for HLH
Complete metabolic panel and viral serologies (EBV, CMV, Parvovirus)
Serum vitamin B12, folate, and copper levels
